pub fn handle_event(event: &Event) -> Result<(), Error> {
    match event.kind {
        EventKind::Message => process_message(event),
        EventKind::Error => process_error(event),
        EventKind::Unknown => Err(Error::UnsupportedEvent),
    }
}

pub fn encode(data: &[u8], format: Format) -> Result<Vec<u8>, Error> {
    match format {
        Format::Json => serde_json::to_vec(data).map_err(|_| Error::EncodeFailed),
        Format::Binary => Ok(data.to_vec()),
        Format::Xml => Err(Error::UnsupportedFormat("XML")),
    }
}

pub fn connect(transport: Transport) -> Result<Connection, Error> {
    match transport {
        Transport::Tcp => Ok(connect_tcp()),
        Transport::Udp => Err(Error::UnsupportedTransport("UDP")),
        Transport::Unix => Err(Error::UnsupportedTransport("Unix")),
    }
}

struct Event { kind: EventKind }
enum EventKind { Message, Error, Unknown }
enum Format { Json, Binary, Xml }
enum Transport { Tcp, Udp, Unix }
struct Connection;
enum Error { UnsupportedEvent, EncodeFailed, UnsupportedFormat(&'static str), UnsupportedTransport(&'static str) }
fn process_message(_e: &Event) -> Result<(), Error> { Ok(()) }
fn process_error(_e: &Event) -> Result<(), Error> { Ok(()) }
fn connect_tcp() -> Connection { Connection }
